message:
feat(mcp,mux): wire quality_timeout_ms into MCP search tool, add domain removal

mcp.rs:
- Mirror effective_search_quality_timeout_ms() and fast_only short-circuit
  from main.rs into the MCP WaSearchTool handler, ensuring the search
  quality timeout config is respected for MCP-initiated searches
- Wire semantic_budget_config update into the MCP search execution path
- Add test: effective_search_quality_timeout_ms_clamps_to_positive

mux/lib.rs:
- Extract remove_domain_internal() from domain removal logic, cleanly
  handling domain map, name index, and default domain replacement when
  the removed domain was the default
- Add tests for domain removal and default domain fallback behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
